title: Therian Symbols: Copy & Paste Δ Theta-Delta & Alterhuman Marks
meta_description: Browse theta-delta (θΔ) marks, paw prints, moon phases, and animal symbols used by the therian and alterhuman community. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The theta-delta (θΔ) community mark plus the paw, moon, and animal symbols of therian and alterhuman identity. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The therian symbol most people search for is the theta-delta — the Greek letters theta (θ) and delta (Δ) combined — adopted by the therianthropy community in 2003 as a shared, respectful identity mark. Therians are people who experience a deep, non-physical identification with an animal, and the wider alterhuman community uses related marks alongside paw prints, moon phases, and animal emoji. This page gathers the theta-delta in its common Unicode forms together with the nature and animal symbols used in TikTok bios, Tumblr blogs, and Discord profiles.
